description: SLO definitions for Aegis homelab cluster (4-node Proxmox)

slos.name: Proxmox API Availability
slos.description: Proxmox REST API (port 8006) responds to requests successfully across all nodes

slos.name: Grafana Dashboard Load Latency
slos.description: Grafana dashboard p95 load time remains under 500ms

slos.name: Prometheus Scrape Success Rate
slos.description: Prometheus successfully scrapes all registered target endpoints

slos.name: NFS Mount Availability
slos.description: NFS mounts on TrueNAS remain accessible across all cluster nodes

slos.name: Node Exporter Collection Error Rate
slos.description: Node exporter metric collection error rate stays below 1% on all nodes

slos.name: VM Start Success Rate
slos.description: VM start operations via Proxmox API complete successfully
